---
title: "Resume and Contact"
format: html
---

# Chorobek Sheranov

**Quantitative Finance | Data Science | Macro Investing**

- Phone: +43 678 7817390
- Email: chorobek2004@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/chorobeksheranov](https://linkedin.com/in/chorobeksheranov)
- GitHub: [github.com/CaptaiNemo4](https://github.com/CaptaiNemo4)

## Summary

Data Science and Economics student at CEU with study abroad at LSE. Experience in equities market risk at Goldman Sachs and data-driven product strategy at Raiffeisen Bank International. Incoming Macro Investment Associate at a hedge fund in Abu Dhabi.

## Education

**BSc Data Science and Economics** (Grade: Distinction)
Central European University, Vienna (September 2022 to June 2026)

- Coursework: Advanced Machine Learning, Econometrics 2, Databases, Bayesian Statistics, Algorithms and Data Structures
- Awards: CEU Tuition Awards (merit-based), CEU Alumni Scholarship (one of two bachelor's recipients)
- Thesis: Analyzing Duration and Convexity of EM vs G10 Bonds under Stress

**Study Abroad, Department of Mathematics** (Course Grade: Distinction)
London School of Economics and Political Science (September 2024 to June 2025)

- Coursework: Stochastic and Actuarial Methods in Finance, Macroeconomics, Valuation, Hedging and Optimization

## Work Experience

**Goldman Sachs**, Summer Analyst, Equities Market Risk
London, UK (June 2025 to August 2025)

- Part of the Goldman Sachs' most competitive intern class in the history (0.7% acceptance rate)
- Investigated VaR spikes across derivatives books through model diagnostics, volatility trends and gamma exposure analysis
- Automated the One Delta block trade risk-assessment workflow with proprietary programming language; solution shared with regional offices and presented to the GSI Chief Market Risk Officer
- Shadowed traders across EM FX, Systematic Trading and Equity Derivatives desks

**Raiffeisen Bank International AG**, Working Student, Investments and Savings Monetization
Vienna, Austria (April 2024 to September 2024)

- Produced data-driven sales strategies for investment and savings products across 14 countries, targeting 13.3M+ customers
- Developed an automated PowerBI reporting system using SQL, later adopted division-wide

**Incoming:** Macro Investment Associate at a hedge fund in Abu Dhabi (Starting 2026)

## Leadership

- **CEU Data Science Society**: Founder and President (2024 to present). Reached 90+ members within a week of launch
- **WUTIS Trading and Investment Society**: Algorithmic Trading Associate (2023 to present)
- **LSE SU Alternative Investments Conference**: Technology Officer (2024 to 2025)

## Achievements

- Future Leaders Exchange Program (FLEX): Class of '22. Selected with less than 1% acceptance rate. GPA: 4.0/4.0, ranked #1
- National Mathematics Olympiad: State Team Captain (Kyrgyzstan, 2019)

## Technical Skills

- **Languages:** Python, SQL, Stata
- **Tools:** Bloomberg, Refinitiv, Excel, PowerBI, PowerPoint, Git, Databricks, Google Analytics

## Languages

English (full professional proficiency), Kyrgyz (native), Russian (bilingual)
